note: Shared useModalFocusTrap hook wires all 9 modal overlays with role=dialog + aria-modal + accessible name + focus trap. Auto-focus on open, restore-on-close with document.contains guard, Tab/Shift+Tab cycle, escaped-focus edge case handled, Escape closes, stopPropagation prevents leak to window-level shortcuts. Icon-only close buttons labeled; CompileDialog inputs labeled. CommentsPanel correctly non-modal (role=complementary). Two subagent review iterations during implementation surfaced issues already fixed.
